classes.reasoning: This document is a curriculum vitae (CV) of a clinical trial investigator (Elena Conti, MD, PhD), listing personal details, education, publications, and financial disclosures. It is not a trial-specific document such as a protocol, consent form, case report form, or any other regulated TMF artifact.

summary: This is a curriculum vitae for Dr. Elena Conti, an Associate Professor of Medical Oncology at Istituto Nazionale dei Tumori in Milano, Italy. The CV includes her education, training, current position, clinical research activities (including principal investigator roles in several oncology trials), selected publications, and financial disclosures. It is not a clinical trial document but rather a professional credentials document.
